narrative: Pearl had its biggest day yet. Volume-weighted PRL jumped to $1.47 (+56.8% 24h) on $854k of cross-venue volume — an 11× expansion from yesterday — and three new Uniswap v4 pools (WPRL/USDT, WPRL/USDC, WPRL/ETH) appeared alongside the existing main pair, so liquidity is now spread across six venues. Bridge throughput went vertical: custody nearly doubled to 281,980 PRL with 78,031 PRL still in inbound deposit addresses awaiting mint, minted WPRL climbed to 196,802, and the surplus rebuilt from 1.08% to 43.28%. Network strengthened in step — MinePRL pool active GPUs rebounded 56 → 158, and network hashrate moved 17.93 → 19.21 EH/s at ~116s blocks. Code shipped on plan: public-frontend pushed a fast-lane-exhausted notice banner (29 commits/7d) and PearlWallet shipped v0.3.0 with vault-proposal deeplinks (5 commits/7d); the L1 repo picked up 15 stars to 105 as the price move drew attention.

market.prl_circulating_supply_method: block_height × current_block_reward (constant-subsidy approximation — Pearl is in month 1, before the first halving)
sources: pool.mineprl.com/v1/public/summary (height × block_reward for circulating supply; block_reward today 2688.46 PRL, slightly below yesterday’s 2696.58 — minor on-chain subsidy adjustment, still pre-halving)

network.active_workers_scope: MinePRL pool only — network-wide miner count is not exposed by Pearl RPC

anomalies: Custody jumped +87% in 24h (150,931 → 281,980 PRL). Driven by inbound deposits: deposit-address grains went from 1.88e9 (≈19 PRL) to 7.80e12 (≈78,031 PRL) and deposit-address count grew 338 → 954. Surplus PRL therefore rebuilt from 1,619 to 85,178 (1.08% → 43.28% of minted WPRL); once the pending 78k PRL clears into mints, surplus will normalize toward the usual single-digit-percent range. Not an incident — looks like a coordinated mint queue.
Volume expanded ~11× ($76k → $854k 24h) with three new Uniswap v4 pools appearing for WPRL/USDT, WPRL/USDC, and WPRL/ETH — liquidity provisioning catching up to price action.
Pool active GPUs rebounded 56 → 158 (+182%) as price moved; consistent with hashrate +7.1% in same window.

social.summary: X API not exercised this run, but consecutive double-digit-percent green days (+24%, +32%, +38%, +57%) plus the L1 repo gaining 15 stars in 24h and active deposit queues read as broadly bullish. A sampled-tweets run would land hard evidence; carrying forward conservatively until then.

github.last_commit_msg: bug fix for bitcoin utils package serializing OP_PUSHDATA1 opcode (#115)
